<!-- GENERATED by sphinxpress. Do not edit by hand. -->

<section id="getting-started">
<h1>Getting started</h1>
<section id="install-for-development">
<h2>Install for development</h2>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>python<span class="w"> </span>-m<span class="w"> </span>pip<span class="w"> </span>install<span class="w"> </span>-e<span class="w"> </span>.
python<span class="w"> </span>-m<span class="w"> </span>pip<span class="w"> </span>install<span class="w"> </span>-e<span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;.[dev]&quot;</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Install the documentation dependencies when building the Sphinx site:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>python<span class="w"> </span>-m<span class="w"> </span>pip<span class="w"> </span>install<span class="w"> </span>-e<span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;.[docs]&quot;</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="create-an-epub-from-a-folder">
<h2>Create an EPUB from a folder</h2>
<p>Create a folder whose Markdown filenames define reading order:</p>
<div class="highlight-text notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>manuscript/
├── 00-front-matter.md
├── 01-introduction.md
└── 02-chapter.md
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>The first file may include simple front matter:</p>
<div class="highlight-markdown notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>---
title: Example Book
language: en
<span class="gu">author: Ada Lovelace</span>
<span class="gu">---</span>

<span class="gh"># Introduction</span>

Hello world.
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Build the EPUB from Python:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">pathlib</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Path</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">text2epub</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">BuildOptions</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">create_epub_from_markdown_folder</span>

<span class="n">create_epub_from_markdown_folder</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;manuscript&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;example.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="n">options</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">BuildOptions</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">include_title_page</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">include_toc_page</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">toc_page_numbers</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">),</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Or use the CLI:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>text2epub<span class="w"> </span>markdown<span class="w"> </span>manuscript/<span class="w"> </span>-o<span class="w"> </span>example.epub<span class="w"> </span>--title-page<span class="w"> </span>--toc-page<span class="w"> </span>--toc-page-numbers
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="create-an-epub-from-one-markdown-file">
<h2>Create an EPUB from one Markdown file</h2>
<p>Create a Markdown chapter:</p>
<div class="highlight-markdown notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="gh"># Chapter One</span>

Hello world.
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Build the EPUB from Python:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">pathlib</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Path</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">text2epub</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">BuildOptions</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">EpubMetadata</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">create_epub_from_markdown_files</span>

<span class="n">create_epub_from_markdown_files</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;chapter-01.md&quot;</span><span class="p">)],</span>
    <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;example.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">EpubMetadata</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Example Book&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;en&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="n">options</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">BuildOptions</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">include_title_page</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">include_toc_page</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">),</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Or use the CLI:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>text2epub<span class="w"> </span>markdown<span class="w"> </span>chapter-01.md<span class="w"> </span>-o<span class="w"> </span>example.epub<span class="w"> </span>--title<span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Example Book&quot;</span><span class="w"> </span>--language<span class="w"> </span>en<span class="w"> </span>--title-page<span class="w"> </span>--toc-page
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="validate-output">
<h2>Validate output</h2>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>text2epub<span class="w"> </span>validate<span class="w"> </span>example.epub
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>A successful response confirms that the archive has the expected EPUB ZIP basics
and that known unresolved internal tokens were not found in text entries. Run
EPUBCheck separately before publication.</p>
</section>
<section id="add-a-title-page-and-visible-contents-page">
<h2>Add a title page and visible contents page</h2>
<p>Set <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">include_title_page=True</span></code> to add a generated title page to the EPUB spine.
Set <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">include_toc_page=True</span></code> to add a reader-visible table of contents page. The
EPUB NAV file is still generated separately for reader navigation.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">toc_page_numbers=True</span></code> requests automatic page numbers in the generated TOC page
using CSS <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">target-counter()</span></code>. EPUB readers do not share one universal page model,
so unsupported readers will show the linked entries without page numbers.</p>
</section>
<section id="safe-inline-xhtml">
<h2>Safe inline XHTML</h2>
<p>By default, raw HTML in Markdown is escaped. Enable safe inline XHTML when source
paragraphs intentionally contain EPUB-safe inline tags:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>text2epub<span class="w"> </span>markdown<span class="w"> </span>manuscript/<span class="w"> </span>-o<span class="w"> </span>example.epub<span class="w"> </span>--allow-inline-xhtml
</pre></div>
</div>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">text2epub</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">BuildOptions</span>

<span class="n">options</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">BuildOptions</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">allow_inline_xhtml</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>This preserves <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">This</span> <span class="pre">is</span> <span class="pre">&lt;em&gt;important&lt;/em&gt;.</span></code> as XHTML. Raw block XHTML, scripts,
event handler attributes, and <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">javascript:</span></code> links are rejected.</p>
</section>
</section>
